EmailTemplate.name: AES - Onboarding Pack Reminder
EmailTemplate.subject: Reminder to complete Onboarding with Alliance Extra Staff
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
DON'T FORGET TO UPLOAD YOUR DOCUMENTATION.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
We are excited to proceed you application with us. Next step is to get your certificates and other compliance documents added to your Alliance Profile.
Head to the Alliance Portal to get started!
START ONBOARDING
If you have any questions, please feel free to call our friendly staff on 1300 662 511.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Extra Staff
